title: Core Components of Algorithmic Game Theory
description: A conceptual diagram illustrating the foundational elements that define Algorithmic Game Theory and their interdependencies.
elements: Game Theory (Mathematical Models of Strategic Interaction)
relationships: Computer Science provides tools to analyze, compute, and implement Game Theory models
Game Theory provides the strategic framework for analyzing systems with autonomous agents
Economic Theory informs the design of systems with desirable properties and outcomes
Applications drive the research questions and validate the theoretical models
